title: Open literature / keywords for domain understanding?
content:
Hi everyone,

I’m trying to build domain understanding for this competition, especially around horizontal wellbore geology prediction, geosteering, type wells, TVT/TST, stratigraphic correlation, and using vertical logs to infer geology along a horizontal well.

I’ve already checked the competition overview and the provided PPTX/materials, but I’d like to go a bit deeper into the domain background.

Many petroleum engineering papers seem to be on OnePetro/SPE and are not always openly accessible. For those working on the domain side, are there any open-access papers, textbooks, lecture notes, GitHub repos, or useful search keywords you recommend?

I’m not asking for paid PDFs or private materials — just public resources that help understand the geological/ML setup of this competition.

Some topics I’m currently searching:

  • geosteering using well logs
  • horizontal well stratigraphic correlation
  • TVT / TST prediction
  • type well correlation
  • well log interpretation for horizontal wells
  • machine learning for well placement / geosteering

Any pointers would be appreciated!
